overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit Night City street at night. The player moves past holographic advertisements and food vendors, eventually stopping at a street food stall under an overhead walkway. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with vibrant pink and blue neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial pedestrian street with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the open street, passing by a glass food display case on the left while approaching a group of pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking away from camera toward the distant street food stall

entered.detail: illuminated glass case displaying food items with a green metal frame
large pink neon billboard with white text mounted on building facade
covered food vendor stall with overhead canopy visible in the distance
floating holographic advertisement with red and blue graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide cyberpunk street at night, illuminated by vibrant pink and blue neon signs. The player walks forward past a glass food display case on the left, heading toward a street food stall visible in the distance. Sparse pedestrians are scattered along the walkway, and holographic advertisements float above the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath overhead pedestrian bridge

events.description: passes under the overhead metal walkway, entering a more enclosed and shadowed area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through a denser crowd while passing under the overhead structure, approaching the food stall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants standing near the food stall entrance

entered.detail: metal pedestrian bridge with support beams crossing over the street
illuminated food service counter with bottles and condiments visible

segments.scene_description: The player moves under an overhead metal walkway, transitioning from the open street into a semi-covered corridor. The lighting becomes more shadowed and mixed as the sky is blocked by the structure above. The food stall ahead grows larger in view, and the crowd density increases with pedestrians moving in opposing directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered market alley with food vendor stalls

events.description: slows down while approaching the food counter, preparing to stop

agents.ego_description: slowing down to examine the food stall offerings, looking at the vendor and menu items

entered.detail: digital menu display showing food items and prices above the counter
grills and food preparation equipment visible behind the counter

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the covered walkway, the player approaches the food stall counter where steam rises from cooking equipment. The space is narrow and enclosed, lit by artificial neon and the warm glow of the food stall. The player slows down to examine the vendor's offerings.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor counter with interactive dialogue

events.description: dialogue text appears on screen indicating interaction with the food vendor NPC

agents.ego_description: stopped at the food counter engaging with the vendor, reading dialogue options

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing behind the counter facing the player, engaging in conversation

segments.scene_description: The player stops at the food counter and engages in dialogue with the vendor NPC. The camera remains stationary focused on the vendor and the food preparation area, with steam rising from the grills. Dialogue text appears on screen indicating an interactive conversation is taking place.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a wide, neon-lit city street into the intimate, enclosed space of a street food stall. It begins by walking past holographic advertisements and glass display cases under a vibrant canopy of pink and blue neon signs. As the camera moves forward, the open street transitions into a semi-covered corridor beneath a metal overhead walkway, where the lighting becomes more shadowed and the crowd of pedestrians grows denser. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches the food stall, moving through a confined space filled with artificial light and rising steam. Finally, the movement ceases at the counter, focusing on the vendor and the glowing grills as an interactive dialogue begins.
